rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LAWRENCE W. WONG 2011 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Carole S. Wongs Motion For Order Quashing Subpoenas Duces Tecum And For Expenses Of The Motion
rulings.Rulings: Carole S. Wong's Motion to Quash Subpoenas Duces Tecum and for Expenses of the Motion is granted in part and denied in part. The Motion is granted only to limit the records subpoenas served on Bank of America, JP Morgan Chase, Chek Tan and Company LLP, and Jann & Tran, to the time period between January 1, 2011 and the date the subpoena was served. The Motion to Quash is otherwise denied, although the Court has a question as to the relevancy of any correspondence, etc. relating to "Michael Mah." Hearing required, to address the Court's question as to the relevancy of any correspondence, etc. relating to "Michael Mah." Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Tuesday, February 21, 2018.
